title: A Ghost Ship and a Living Skeleton
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Hogback, Perona, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Hogback, Perona, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #1, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What's a man like that doing here?

dialogue.speaker: Hogback
dialogue.text: That's how it is...!? That's tough....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You don't make my heart skip!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And Ossan will be saved, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Meanwhile, at Hopback's mansion-- Usopp team

dialogue.speaker: Hogback
dialogue.text: FO-.--S FOS FOS FOS FOR FOS...!!

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: What are you saying, Cindy- Chan!!?

dialogue.speaker: Hogback
dialogue.text: Your violent words Horrify me every time!!

dialogue.speaker: Hogback
dialogue.text: Ah....!! yeah, okay. What's on tonight's menu?

dialogue.speaker: Hogback
dialogue.text: Plates should just cease to exist...

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Hogback, Perona, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #1, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton.
